Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

anybody knows a RSS addon or hack for our wiki ?

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-08-19 · 4 answers
??
user [75] · 2007-08-19
what do you want to do, import RSS-feeds from other sites? i guess so, because the wiki-site already exports RSS-feeds.

heres the description for the module (or hack, or whatever its called):
http://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/RSS_into_Wiki

heres the installation to download, with instructions:
http://blogger-bee.com/index.php/RSSWiki_Install

i havent tried it myself yet. tell me if theres any problems.
user [2] · 2007-08-19
download page gives 404
user [75] · 2007-08-19
yes, i was trying to download and doesnt work. unfortunately, all download sites offering the script just link to that, not working one.

im sure there must be a working version of that script somewhere; i used to have an installation of tikiwiki that had rss import, probably using the same script.

if i find one ill upload it here.
user [75] · 2007-08-19
found something similar; the original file seems to have disappeared for some reason. i dont know if this will work in the same way decribed in the wiki-article mentioned in my previous message, but it should work - somehow. if i find time ill try to make it work on my local wiki-installation and tell you whats the result ...
